$comment: Registry of structures we've built in the world, with coordinates. Append new builds here. Coordinates are Minecraft block coords (x, y, z).

builds.name: Spawn Castle
features: 31x31 battlemented outer walls (top y73, merlons y74)
4 corner towers, 5x5, to y79 (roof) with battlements y80
central keep 11x11 to y77, with door/windows and interior lighting
west gatehouse: 3-wide opening at z111-113, faces spawn

builds.name: Castle Moat
builds.notes: 3-wide water ring just outside the walls; stone-lined basin with an outer lip so it doesn't leak. Continuous around all four sides.

builds.name: Drawbridge
builds.notes: Spans the west moat at the gate (walk z111-113). Oak-fence railings, lanterns on the posts, and chains rising up the gatehouse front. Stone path leads from spawn onto the bridge.

builds.name: Death Star
builds.status: exterior shell + iconic details (superlaser dish, equatorial trench, hull paneling)

superlaser_dish.notes: Concave bowl, ~48 across, iron/light-gray concentric rings, black core, sea-lantern focusing lens.

equatorial_trench.notes: Recessed channel around the whole sphere at the equator; gray-concrete back wall, iron rim shelves.

details.hull_paneling: 10 light-gray latitude seam rings (iron recoloured) for the paneled look

builds.notes: Giant hollow iron sphere, ~101 blocks across, 1-block hole-free shell. Floats west of spawn, clear of the castle. tp drops you inside the hollow interior.

entities.name: Mech (placeholder)
entities.notes: Rideable IronGolem-based mech from mech-mod. Right-click to pilot, WASD to drive. Not a fixed location — spawned on demand.
